text:
Market today: The sentiment is souring, with economic outlook worsening. This is hitting tech and chip names hard, which is exactly where you're concentrated.

Your holdings: QQQ (-2.01%) and SMH (-11.53%) are flagged for attention. SOXL (-44.81%) is deep in the red, and as a leveraged ETF, margin amplifies these drops. SPAL (-47.16%) is also a leveraged ETF and a brand-new, very volatile position. 

Watch: Keep an eye on the semiconductor names and broader tech sentiment.

Bottom line: You're heavily exposed to a sector under pressure, and margin is not your friend right now.
plays: Respect SMH stop at 540. If it breaks, consider trimming.
Consider trimming QQQ if it continues to break down.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
